productDisplayName: Puma Women Essential Skinny Black 3/4 Pant
description: Composition Black capris made of 88% polyester and 12% elastane, with a broad, elasticated v-shaped waistband, sea green panels from the waist to the hem on both sides and printed branding on the upper left side Fitting Slim Wash care Gentle machine wash with lukewarm water Do not bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; Do not iron on decorations Soft on the inside and sporty on the outside, these capris from puma make a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Crafted from a polyester/elastane blend, these pants are ideal for your Sports training, jogging sessions or just laid back weekends. The soft blended fabric keeps you dry and comfortable and the sporty look does wonders for your casual style. Pair this with a sporty T-shirt and running shoes. Model statistics Model is a size M of height 5'7”; Waist: 25”; Hips: 35”
